failures.description: The agent deviated from the required tool-call plan by searching all Jigsaw Puzzles instead of only available ones. Although the final answer happened to be correct because the lowest-priced item was available, the required action sequence was violated at the tool-call preparation step.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to find the cheapest available Jigsaw Puzzle. The agent understood the goal, but at step 2 it prepared a ProductCatalogSearch call with available_only=false, even though the query required filtering to available items. All required information was already available: the product type and availability constraint were in the user request. This is not an invalid invocation because the tool call was well-formed and executed successfully. It is not a tool-output interpretation issue because the mistake occurred before receiving tool output.
